rulings.Case Title: JOHN PERNIZ VS. SEQUOIA VENTURES INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order As To Plaintiffs Notice Of Deposition Of Third Party Witness John Rottman
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 21, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant FDCC California Inc.¿s motion for protective order as to plaintiffs¿ notice of deposition of third party witness John Rottman is continued on the court¿s own motion to June 3, 2013 at 9:00a.m. in Department 220, Hon. James J. McBride presiding. = (220/JJM)
